warnings: One of 2 split sheets on this source PNG (หน้า83); sibling is _หน้า83_2_drain_vent_pipe_boq.json. This is the physical RIGHT half of the landscape scan (rotate 90 degrees counter-clockwise to read), the lower-numbered sheet (แผ่นที่ 13/20), paired with แผ่นที่ 14/20 extracted as _2.json.

This sheet is a sub-category rollup (3.1-3.3) with no quantities of its own -- detail/quantity breakdown for each sub-item is expected on later pages; the 'รวมข้อ 3' grand-total row at the bottom is blank, consistent with detail still to come.
All unit-price/amount columns are blank in the source for every row -- transcribed as null, not invented.
